commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Remember me, O LORD, with the favor that you bear unto your people: O visit me with your salvation; Us. Hebrew, "me. "But Aquila, Syriac, agree with the Septuagint. Some of the Jews were already returned, and pray for the liberation of their brethren. (Calmet) The Fathers explain it of Christian converts. Chrysostom) People. According to thy gracious promises, that we may enjoy the blessings of thy elect. (Worthington).
